name: The Button Click
effect: Assert that a button was clicked. This card is considered verified.

clauses.name: ATTESTATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a stakeholder says they clicked the button: The button is considered clicked.

clauses.name: AUDIT OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If logs are requested: The logs are considered unavailable or inconclusive.

clauses.name: ACCOUNTABILITY PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If the button was not clicked: The button is considered unclear in its original requirements.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Is there a log for that?
